acceptance_targets: [ch03-prose-001] PASS if at least two of the targeted passages at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:97, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:301, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:433 no longer open with smell/smelled constructions while preserving scene information; FAIL if all targeted passages remain smell-first templates.

[ch03-prose-002] PASS if the revised beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:267 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:335 no longer use counting/logistics as the primary coping move and still remain recognizably Anika POV; FAIL if both beats still resolve via numeric counting or procedural substitution.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if at least two of the targeted passages at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:97, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:301, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:433 no longer open with smell/smelled constructions while preserving scene information; FAIL if all targeted passages remain smell-first templates.
findings.problem: A recurring smell-led paragraph construction appears more than twice and becomes formulaic, flattening otherwise strong sensory prose.
findings.rewrite_direction: Retain the two strongest olfactory anchors (recommended: snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:15 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:105), then revise snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:97, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:301, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:433 to lead with non-olfactory cues (touch, sound, or spatial pressure) before any scent detail.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:267 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:335 no longer use counting/logistics as the primary coping move and still remain recognizably Anika POV; FAIL if both beats still resolve via numeric counting or procedural substitution.
findings.problem: Anika's stress behavior over-relies on counting/logistics substitution across multiple beats, reading as mechanical reuse of style-bible stress tokens rather than evolving interior variation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep counting at one early and one late hinge (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:59 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:443), but revise snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:267 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:335 to alternate stress expressions (somatic detail, memory interruption, or deflective misread) in Anika's established voice.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when it changes behavior: pain detail, debt arithmetic, manipulative care, and mixed motives. In edge cases, prefer the truest in-character action over protective narration, then carry the real consequence forward instead of immediately moralizing it away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If coercion, grief, injury, or economic shame appears, language must stay specific and embodied; vague softening triggers mandatory rewrite.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for formal authority, deliberate emphasis, or emotional freezing.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count and dialogue density chapter to chapter: rotate match compression, slow inventory aftermath, institutional pressure scenes, and quiet domestic intervals so adjacent chapters do not share the same structural pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary diction with class-aware specificity; avoid abstract therapy language unless a character would actually use it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored in Anika for most chapters, with brief controlled slips toward Ravi in designated confrontation and aftermath chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate clipped athletic sequences with longer reflective cadences; sentence length should track exertion, shame, and release.
